item.title: ClipperCreek HCS-40 Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured) - 32A, 7.7kW
item.description:
Experience fast, reliable EV charging with this remanufactured ClipperCreek HCS-40 Level 2 charging station. This professional-grade 32A charger operates on 220-240V power to deliver 7.7kW charging capacity, making it perfect for home garages and commercial installations.
This Level 2 charging station provides up to 5 times faster charging than standard Level 1 chargers, delivering up to 25 miles of driving range per hour. The universal J1772 connector ensures compatibility with all electric vehicles, including Tesla models when used with an appropriate adapter.
Built for durability, this ClipperCreek charger features a NEMA 4-rated weatherproof enclosure suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. Advanced safety features include UL-listing with built-in overcurrent, overvoltage, and surge protection for secure charging operations.
The extended 25-foot charging cable provides exceptional flexibility for reaching different parking positions, while the hardwired installation ensures a secure and reliable connection. Whether you're upgrading from a basic Level 1 charger or installing dedicated EV charging infrastructure, this remanufactured ClipperCreek unit delivers professional performance with environmental responsibility.

item.title: Wallbox Pulsar Plus 40A Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured)
item.description:
Experience premium electric vehicle charging with this remanufactured Wallbox Pulsar Plus 40A Level 2 charging station. This compact yet high-performance charger combines space-efficient design with reliable 40-amp charging capability, delivering excellent charging speeds for residential and commercial applications.
This intelligent charging solution features seamless compatibility with all electric vehicles currently available, ensuring future-proof investment for any EV owner. The advanced Wallbox mobile application provides complete control over your charging sessions through intuitive WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity, enabling remote monitoring, scheduling, and energy management from any smart device.
Engineered for straightforward installation, this Pulsar Plus unit streamlines the setup process while maintaining professional-grade reliability. Smart charging technology optimizes power delivery and energy efficiency, making home EV charging both convenient and cost-effective.
Whether upgrading from basic charging solutions or establishing new EV infrastructure, this remanufactured Wallbox unit delivers cutting-edge performance with environmental sustainability. Professional refurbishment ensures reliable operation while supporting eco-friendly practices through equipment reuse.

item.title: ChargePoint Home Flex Level 2 EV Charger (Remanufactured) - 40A, 9.6kW
item.description:
Upgrade your electric vehicle charging experience with this remanufactured ChargePoint Home Flex Level 2 charging station. This 40-amp EV charger operates on 220-240V power to deliver an impressive 9.6kW charging capacity, making it an ideal solution for residential garages, workplace installations, and commercial properties.
This Level 2 charging station dramatically reduces charging time compared to standard 120V chargers, providing 25-30 miles of driving range per hour of charging. The universal J1772 connector ensures compatibility with virtually all electric vehicles, including Tesla models when used with an appropriate adapter.
Built for versatility, this ChargePoint charger features a weather-resistant NEMA 3R-rated enclosure suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. Multiple safety systems protect against electrical issues, while smart connectivity enables remote monitoring and scheduling through the ChargePoint mobile application.
Professional hardwired installation ensures reliable performance and eliminates the hassle of plug-in connections. Whether you're upgrading from a basic Level 1 charger or installing your first dedicated EV charging solution, this remanufactured ChargePoint unit delivers professional-grade performance at exceptional value.

item.title: Wallbox Pulsar Plus 48A Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured)
item.description:
Experience premium electric vehicle charging with this remanufactured Wallbox Pulsar Plus 48A Level 2 charging station. This compact yet high-performance charger combines space-efficient design with robust 48-amp charging capability, delivering exceptional charging speeds for residential and light commercial applications.
This intelligent charging solution features seamless compatibility with all electric vehicles currently available, ensuring future-proof investment for any EV owner. The advanced Wallbox mobile application provides complete control over your charging sessions through intuitive WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity, enabling remote monitoring, scheduling, and energy management from any smart device.
Engineered for straightforward installation, this Pulsar Plus unit streamlines the setup process while maintaining professional-grade reliability. Smart charging technology optimizes power delivery and energy efficiency, making home EV charging both convenient and cost-effective.
Whether upgrading from basic charging solutions or establishing new EV infrastructure, this remanufactured Wallbox unit delivers cutting-edge performance with environmental sustainability. Professional refurbishment ensures reliable operation while supporting eco-friendly practices through equipment reuse.

item.title: Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector Level 2 EV Charger - Remanufactured 48A
item.description:
Professional-grade Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector Level 2 EV charging station delivering up to 11.5kW (48A) fast charging power for Tesla vehicles. This remanufactured EV charger provides up to 44 miles of range per hour - 6x faster than standard Level 1 chargers.
**Key Features:** • **Level 2 Fast Charging**: Up to 11.5kW power output (48A at 240V) for rapid charging • **Tesla Integration**: Designed exclusively for Tesla vehicles with seamless app connectivity • **Weather-Resistant**: NEMA 3R rated for indoor/outdoor installation (garages, driveways, commercial) • **Smart Charging**: Monitor and schedule charging through Tesla mobile app • **Extended Reach**: 24-foot cable length for flexible positioning • **Safety Certified**: cULus and UL Listed with overcurrent, overvoltage, and overheating protection
**Performance Specifications:** - Power Output: Up to 11.5kW (48A at 240V) - Charging Speed: 25-44 miles of range per hour - Connector: Tesla proprietary connector - Installation: Professional hardwired setup recommended - Cable Length: 24 feet for maximum flexibility
**Remanufactured Quality Assurance:** Each Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector undergoes comprehensive remanufacturing with rigorous quality control. Every unit is restored, tested, and inspected to meet or exceed original Tesla specifications, ensuring dependable performance and long-term reliability.
**Perfect For:** - Tesla Model S, 3, X, Y owners - Home garage installations - Workplace charging stations - Commercial property EV infrastructure - Upgrade from Level 1 charging
Transform your Tesla charging experience with professional-grade Level 2 charging that delivers Tesla-optimized performance, smart connectivity, and weather-resistant durability for years of reliable service.

item.title: Lithium Rhino 36V 65Ah LiFePO4 Golf Cart Conversion Kit (Battery + Charger + Accessories)
item.description:
The Lithium Rhino 36V 65Ah LiFePO4 Conversion Kit is a drop-in lithium upgrade engineered for 36V electric golf carts including EZGO TXT/RXV, Club Car DS/Precedent/Tempo, and Yamaha Drive/Drive2. Lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) chemistry delivers up to 50% more range, cuts cart weight by 60–70% versus lead-acid, and lasts 12+ years with zero watering or terminal maintenance.
This complete conversion bundle includes the Lithium Rhino battery, fast charger, DC-to-DC voltage converter, LCD touchscreen state-of-charge display, and full mounting hardware — everything required to retire your lead-acid pack in a single afternoon.
**Key Specs:** 6,000+ deep-cycle charge cycles · IP65 weatherproof rating · -4°F to 131°F operating range · 200A continuous / 500A peak discharge · Bluetooth app monitoring & anti-theft lockout · UN38.3 + MDSD certified · Up to 4 batteries parallel-connectable for fleet expansion.
**Warranty:** Industry-leading 8-year warranty (6 years complete coverage + 2 years pro-rated, $500 deductible). One of the longest warranties available on a golf cart lithium battery.
**Shipping:** Ground freight ships from US warehouse via HazMat-certified carrier (Class 9, UN3480). Bulk fleet orders of 3 or more batteries ship freight-free.
Direct equivalent to FSIP part number 113-LR38V65AH. Approximate weight: 49 lbs.
Full technical specification sheet: https://mzsozezflbhebykncbmr.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/lithium-rhino/lr3665.pdf

item.title: Lithium Rhino 48V 120Ah Heated LiFePO4 Golf Cart Replacement Battery (Battery Only)
item.description:
The Lithium Rhino 48V 120Ah LiFePO4 Replacement Battery is a drop-in lithium upgrade engineered for 48V electric golf carts including EZGO TXT/RXV, Club Car DS/Precedent/Tempo, and Yamaha Drive/Drive2. Lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) chemistry delivers up to 50% more range, cuts cart weight by 60–70% versus lead-acid, and lasts 12+ years with zero watering or terminal maintenance.
Battery-only replacement for owners who already have a lithium-compatible charger and DC converter installed. Drop-in replacement uses the same mounting footprint as the original Lithium Rhino kit battery.
**Heated all-weather variant**: Built-in low-temperature heating element keeps cells in their optimal charge window down to -4°F, eliminating the cold-weather capacity loss that plagues unheated lithium packs. Ideal for northern climates, mountain communities, and any cart stored in unheated barns or garages.
**Key Specs:** 6,000+ deep-cycle charge cycles · IP65 weatherproof rating · -4°F to 131°F operating range · 200A continuous / 500A peak discharge · Bluetooth app monitoring & anti-theft lockout · UN38.3 + MDSD certified · Up to 4 batteries parallel-connectable for fleet expansion.
**Warranty:** Industry-leading 8-year warranty (6 years complete coverage + 2 years pro-rated, $500 deductible). One of the longest warranties available on a golf cart lithium battery.
**Shipping:** Ground freight ships from US warehouse via HazMat-certified carrier (Class 9, UN3480). Bulk fleet orders of 3 or more batteries ship freight-free.
Direct equivalent to FSIP part number 113-LR51V120AH-H. Approximate weight: 120 lbs.

item.title: Mitsubishi 93051-10068 Lift Cylinder Seal Kit (Aftermarket)
item.description:
Aftermarket lift cylinder seal kit equivalent to Mitsubishi OEM part number 93051-10068. Rebuilds the main lift cylinder on Mitsubishi FGC20K, FGC25K, FDC20K, and FDC25K forklifts (and serial number ranges sharing the same cylinder family). The kit contains all O-rings, rod seals, wiper, piston seal, backup rings, snap rings, and miscellaneous wear components needed for a complete cylinder reseal.
Direct cross-reference for Caterpillar 93051-10068, CT93051-10068, DW93051-10068, MB93051-10068, and 9305110068. Mitsubishi and Caterpillar share many forklift cylinder assemblies under the MCFA (Mitsubishi-Caterpillar Forklift America) partnership — this seal kit fits both brand applications where the cylinder bore and rod diameters match the 40 × 50 mm specification.
Common installation use case: hydraulic fluid leaking past the lift cylinder rod, slow lift response, or visible weeping at the rod gland are all indicators of failed rod and piston seals. A full reseal with this kit restores rated lifting capacity and eliminates fluid loss for a fraction of the cost of replacing the entire cylinder assembly.
Includes installation-grade lubricant compatibility, anti-extrusion backup rings, and matched O-ring durometers to OEM specification. Install only on a properly cleaned cylinder bore — pitting or scoring will defeat new seals and should be honed or repaired before reassembly.
In stock and ships same business day when ordered before 3 PM EST. Backed by our 90-day return policy on unused parts.
